title: DM's tweaks
body:
## Summary

This is a simple pack that attempts to improve some existing textures and add some life to the world by adding new visual features with optifine.

## FAQ

### Are you gonna port this pack to 1.X.X?

I do not plan on backporting this pack, no.

### Is there gonna be a bedrock version of this pack?

Haven't decided yet, but probably not.

Did this not answer your question? Did you find a bug and want to report it? You can reach out to me on  Discord!
